title: PF_Abort
parameters: part ID	Specify the part ID (integer number from 1 to 32).
description:
Immediately stops (suspends) the Part Feeding flow.

Unlike PF_Stop, this suspends the callback function in progress.

Nothing will occur when using this function when the Part Feeding flow has not been started.

When operating in multi-part, any PartID set in PF_Start can be specified.

Cannot be executed from a virtual controller or command window.

PF_Abort Example

PF_Abort 1
